// note: Example MCP client entries for Buyer Team's Strands orchestrator.
// local: Run ATLAS Counsel as a local subprocess (stdin/stdout MCP). No auth in local mode.
// remote: Connect to the deployed AWS instance over Streamable HTTP.
// jwt: Prefer the JWT variant — the token carries the tenant_id claim, so each customer gets their own isolated tenant. Generate tokens with: python -c "import jwt, time; print(jwt.encode({'tenant_id':'acme','iat':int(time.time()),'aud':'atlas-counsel'}, '<secret>', algorithm='HS256'))"

atlas-counsel-local.description: Procurement RAG: counsel_ask, counsel_resume, counsel_brief, counsel_health

atlas-counsel-remote-apikey.description: Procurement RAG — API key auth (single-tenant fallback)
